sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 3.6g of fat. cholesterol adds to the tradeoff. for meats, fat quality matters a lot once the protein is already there.
sections.subtitleText: 3.6g of fat. cholesterol adds to the tradeoff. for meats, fat quality matters a lot once the protein is already there.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 3.9g of carbs. outside of that, the profile is pretty quiet. in this category, carbs barely matter.
sections.subtitleText: 3.9g of carbs. outside of that, the profile is pretty quiet. in this category, carbs barely matter.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 20.4g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. strong protein is expected here, so the rest of the profile decides how high it climbs.
sections.subtitleText: 20.4g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. strong protein is expected here, so the rest of the profile decides how high it climbs.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin b12 at 2500% daily value stands out most. that is major vitamin support.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin b12 at 2500% daily value stands out most. that is major vitamin support.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: iron at 36% daily value, zinc at 37% daily value stand out most. useful, but still not a major mineral edge.
sections.subtitleText: iron at 36% daily value, zinc at 37% daily value stand out most. useful, but still not a major mineral edge.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side: extreme micronutrient density because a direct stress test for whether meats underweight nutrient bombs. heme iron case is very strong because hard to ignore in meat scoring. protein quality is excellent because still a strong meat on the protein axis too.

sections.narration: the drawbacks next: cholesterol is extremely high because major drawback. overconsumption risk is real because extremely nutrient-dense is not automatically simple. taste is polarising because practical downside.

closing.summary: Beef Liver has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best when you want efficient protein and can accept the category tradeoffs that come with it.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when you want efficient protein and can accept the category tradeoffs that come with it.
